archetype: Noir Editorial Tech (Hybrid of Jewel & Luxury + Electric & Neon)
design_philosophy: A sophisticated fusion of high-end editorial storytelling (Serif typography, generous negative space) with cutting-edge tech aesthetics (Dark mode, monospaced tech stats, subtle neon tracing accents). This captures the dual nature of an international executive bridging business strategy and AI innovation.

hierarchy.h1: font-serif text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-none text-white
hierarchy.h2: font-serif text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-white

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-12 to p-32) combined with strict asymmetric grids. Break out of the standard container for high-impact editorial imagery.

component_specs.navbar: Fixed top, z-50. Glassmorphism backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/60 border-b border-white/5. Must include a PT/EN toggle button (data-testid='lang-toggle'). Links in font-sans text-sm.
component_specs.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large serif headline 'Architecting the Future' overlapping the rooftop portrait image. The image must use a dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#050505] via-[#050505]/60 to-transparent) so text is perfectly readable. Neon cyan accent line (1px) used as a divider.
component_specs.about: Editorial 2-column flow. Left: the 4-grid lifestyle composite image. Right: Personal story highlighting Azcarental ownership and tech companies. Use a large drop cap or a stylized serif quote.
component_specs.services: Bento 'Control Room' grid layout for the 3 services (Innovation Consulting, AI Consulting, Digital Transformation). Cards use flat surface (#121212) with 1px subtle border. Hover effect: Border glows cyan (#00F0FF) using framer-motion or CSS transition. Bullet points in font-mono.
component_specs.credentials: A stark, minimalist grid. Do not use generic image logos; instead, build premium typographic badges using JetBrains Mono (e.g., '[ MBA @mbiusp ]', '[ @uffoficial ]', '[ IBM Certified ]', '[ Chaplain ]'). This maintains the high-end editorial tech aesthetic.
component_specs.testimonials_case_studies: Use the laptop portrait image alongside a sleek slider or grid of case study highlights. Combine serif for quotes and mono for ROI metrics.
component_specs.contact_form: Terminal-meets-luxury aesthetic. Minimalist Shadcn inputs with only a bottom border (border-b border-white/20). Focus state adds a cyan glow. Form fields: Name, Email, Service Interest (Select), Message. Save securely to MongoDB. Display contact info: +1 (619) 997-1471 / lucasa@bluegemsmgmt.com.
component_specs.footer: Massive padding (py-24). High-contrast text. Social links in monospace.

hero_portrait.description: Rooftop sunset portrait for the Hero section. Needs gradient masking to blend into the dark background.

about_lifestyle.description: 4-grid lifestyle composite to anchor the About / Bio section.

case_studies_laptop.description: Laptop professional indoor image. Use in the Case Studies or Contact Section to build trust.

animations.scroll: Implement Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
animations.entrances: Framer Motion staggered fade-up (y: 30, opacity: 0 -> 1) on scroll.
animations.interactions: Interactive elements must scale down slightly on active/click. Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect for high-tier service cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Theme. Use #050505 for background, NEVER pure white background anywhere.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' (headings), 'Manrope' (body), and 'JetBrains Mono' (tech/data) are properly imported from Google Fonts.
Bilingual toggle is a core requirement. Build a centralized dictionary/state for PT and EN strings and dynamically switch them via the navbar toggle.

Use pure HTML/Tailwind for creative, overlapping layouts in marketing sections. Only use Shadcn UI primitives for the Contact Form, Selects, or Dialogs. Do not trap the main layout in rigid Shadcn Cards.
All interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, language toggle) MUST have descriptive 'data-testid' attributes.
Implement the Contact API route using Mongoose/MongoDB to save incoming consultation requests.
Display the exact requested contact details: '+1 (619) 997-1471' and 'lucasa@bluegemsmgmt.com' clearly in the footer or contact section.
